name_cn:
Top Quality
 【Top Grade】M13644👏🏻👏A two-tone "Gypsee Wallet" featuring Louis Vuitton's iconic monogram, attracting attention this season. The design uses a single pattern in contrasting shades on the leather, accented with classic gold on the exquisite circular zipper-style opening. Dimensions: 19.5 x 10.5 x 2.5cm.🎁🎁
